head: 8d92ea3c58dbadc7440b39cdef01739fe28381fb
summary: Architecture and specification align with controller, guarded-run enforcement, atomic escape, rollback, persistence authority, and compatibility boundaries.
inspection_summary: Independently inspected Story, Architecture, Spec, controller, orchestrator, guarded-run integration, focused tests and E2E coverage. Canonical suffix enforcement, atomic waiting transition, and rollback bypass are consistent.
judgment_delta: Prior needs_changes becomes pass because enforced suffix selection, atomic escape persistence, and full rollback bypass are now documented, implemented, and tested.
